name: Dunelm Group PLC
description: The UK's leading homewares retailer with 180+ stores plus a growing digital platform, offering affordable and high-quality home essentials.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Market share gains in UK homewares (~10% share). Digital channel growth, new store openings (target 200 stores), and average basket growth. FY2025 revenue +3.8% to £1,771m.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Gross margin improving to 52.4% in FY2025. Operating margin stable at 12.5%. Operational efficiency and direct sourcing benefits offset by wage inflation.
assumptions.risks: Consumer confidence sensitivity, housing market dependency, competitive pressure from online retailers, cost inflation. Net debt rising (£102m at FY2025) from share buybacks and special dividends.
assumptions.catalyst: Continued market share gains, store rollout to 200+, digital penetration, and consistent cash return policy (ordinary + special dividends).
